page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC processors. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 48 physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 13 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

The dedicated CPU allocation with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio provides predictable compute performance without resource contention from hyperthreading. This resource density makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for multi-threaded workloads that require stable CPU execution and a balanced memory footprint. Suitable workloads include general-purpose application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and medium-sized databases that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.12xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC processors. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 48 physical cores with a single thread per core at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz, ensuring predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead. It is configured with 192.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 13 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource ratio, this server is designed for workloads requiring stable processing power and moderate memory capacity, such as web serving, container orchestration, application servers, and distributed enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB RAM, and 13 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC server offering forty-eight physical cores and a balanced memory profile for predictable general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio
192.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
13 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage
Designed for general-purpose applications, web serving, and containerized workloads
